<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="configuration">
<h1>Configuration</h1>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress</span></code> reads <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress.toml</span></code> from the current directory unless <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--config</span></code> is provided.</p>
<section id="build-logs">
<h2>Build logs</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[build].log_dir</span></code> (default <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;work_dir&gt;/logs</span></code>) controls where sphinxpress writes timestamped command logs. The directory is created on demand. Each Sphinx, WeasyPrint, and managed-environment pip run writes one <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ-&lt;stem&gt;.log</span></code> file plus a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">latest-&lt;stem&gt;.log</span></code> copy that points at the most recent run. Stable log stems include:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">site-&lt;project&gt;-json</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">validate-&lt;project&gt;-dummy</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">validate-&lt;project&gt;-linkcheck</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">book-epub-sphinx</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">book-pdf-singlehtml</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">book-pdf-weasyprint</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">env-pip-upgrade</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">env-pip-install</span></code></p></li>
</ul>
<p>Override the default location in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sphinxpress.toml</span></code>:</p>
<div class="highlight-toml notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">[build]</span>
<span class="n">work_dir</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;.sphinxpress&quot;</span>
<span class="n">log_dir</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;.sphinxpress/logs&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Sphinx and WeasyPrint failures include the relevant <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Log:</span></code> path so the full stdout and stderr can be inspected without rerunning the build.</p>
</section>
<section id="site-settings">
<h2>Site settings</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[site]</span></code> controls generated Jekyll paths, layout names, and the public base URL.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">protect_liquid</span></code> defaults to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">true</span></code> and wraps generated Sphinx HTML in one
Jekyll-compatible raw block after front matter. This keeps literal <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">{{</span> <span class="pre">...</span> <span class="pre">}}</span></code>
and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">{%</span> <span class="pre">...</span> <span class="pre">%}</span></code> examples visible on Jekyll 3 without an external post-processing
script.</p>
<p>Optional site versioning keeps one logical <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[[projects]]</span></code> entry per repository
while expanding it into multiple build targets:</p>
<div class="highlight-toml notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">[site]</span>
<span class="n">protect_liquid</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>

<span class="k">[site.versioning]</span>
<span class="n">enabled</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span>
<span class="n">default</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;release&quot;</span>

<span class="k">[[site.versioning.variants]]</span>
<span class="n">name</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;release&quot;</span>
<span class="n">label</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Latest release&quot;</span>
<span class="n">source</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;release&quot;</span>
<span class="n">url_segment</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="k">[[site.versioning.variants]]</span>
<span class="n">name</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;main&quot;</span>
<span class="n">label</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Current main&quot;</span>
<span class="n">source</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;git_ref&quot;</span>
<span class="n">ref</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;main&quot;</span>
<span class="n">url_segment</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;main&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>When <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[site.versioning]</span></code> is absent or disabled, sphinxpress keeps the legacy
single-working-tree behavior with the existing <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">/tools/&lt;project&gt;/</span></code> URL layout.</p>
</section>
<section id="build-settings">
<h2>Build settings</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[build]</span></code> controls the work directory, Sphinx executable, warning policy, and parallel build setting.</p>
<p>Use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[build.env]</span></code> to enable a shared managed virtual environment for Sphinx and documentation dependencies.</p>
</section>
<section id="book-settings">
<h2>Book settings</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[book]</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[epub]</span></code>, and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[pdf]</span></code> configure aggregate book metadata and output
paths. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[pdf].builder</span></code> now defaults to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">weasyprint</span></code>, which renders aggregate
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">singlehtml</span></code> output to PDF without LaTeX. Set <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[pdf].builder</span> <span class="pre">=</span> <span class="pre">&quot;latexpdf&quot;</span></code> only
when you explicitly want the legacy LaTeX-based Sphinx path.</p>
<p>When site versioning is enabled, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[book].docs_variant</span></code> selects exactly one
configured docs variant for EPUB and PDF builds:</p>
<div class="highlight-toml notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">[book]</span>
<span class="n">docs_variant</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;release&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>It defaults to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[site.versioning].default</span></code>.</p>
<p>EPUB builds should provide non-empty <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">version</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">copyright</span></code> values:</p>
<div class="highlight-toml notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">[book]</span>
<span class="n">title</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Example Documentation&quot;</span>
<span class="n">author</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Example Team&quot;</span>
<span class="n">language</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span>
<span class="n">version</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0.1.0&quot;</span>
<span class="n">copyright</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;2026, Example Team&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">suppress_warnings</span> <span class="pre">=</span> <span class="pre">[&quot;ref.python&quot;]</span></code> only as a temporary aggregate-book workaround for ambiguous Python cross-references that cannot yet be fixed in source docs.</p>
<p>If <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[build.env].enabled</span> <span class="pre">=</span> <span class="pre">true</span></code> and you want PDF output, include
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">weasyprint&gt;=67</span></code> in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[build.env].packages</span></code> so the managed environment provides
the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">weasyprint</span></code> executable used by the PDF build.</p>
</section>
<section id="projects">
<h2>Projects</h2>
<p>Each <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[[projects]]</span></code> entry points to one existing Sphinx documentation project:</p>
<div class="highlight-toml notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">[[projects]]</span>
<span class="n">name</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;tool-a&quot;</span>
<span class="n">title</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;Tool A&quot;</span>
<span class="n">docs_root</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;../tool-a/docs&quot;</span>
<span class="n">conf_dir</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;../tool-a/docs&quot;</span>
<span class="n">root_doc</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;index&quot;</span>
<span class="n">repo_url</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;https://github.com/example/tool-a&quot;</span>
<span class="n">release_strategy</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;manual&quot;</span>
<span class="n">release_tag</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;v0.1.0&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Project names are used in generated URLs and must be URL-safe.</p>
<p>Projects can optionally limit which site variants they publish and override the
ref for <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">git_ref</span></code> variants:</p>
<div class="highlight-toml notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">[[projects]]</span>
<span class="n">name</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;tool-a&quot;</span>
<span class="c1"># ...</span>
<span class="n">site_variants</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;release&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;main&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="n">version_refs</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">main</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;origin/main&quot;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">version_refs</span></code> applies only to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">git_ref</span></code> variants. sphinxpress does not fetch
missing refs or tags automatically; fetch them before running <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">check</span></code>,
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">build-site</span></code>, or <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">validate</span></code>.</p>
</section>
</section>
</div>
<script data-sphinxpress-script="search" defer>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  function initForm(form) {
    var input = form.querySelector(".tool-search-input");
    var results = form.querySelector(".tool-search-results");
    var navList = form.parentElement
      ? form.parentElement.querySelector(".tool-nav-list")
      : null;
    if (!input || !results) {
      return;
    }
    var emptyText = form.getAttribute("data-search-empty") || "No matches.";
    var indexUrl = form.getAttribute("data-search-index");
    if (!indexUrl) {
      hideForm();
      return;
    }

    var indexEntries = null;
    var indexError = false;
    var pendingQuery = null;

    function hideForm() {
      form.style.display = "none";
    }

    function escapeHtml(value) {
      return value
        .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
        .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
        .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
        .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
        .replace(/'/g, "&#39;");
    }

    function showEmpty() {
      results.innerHTML =
        '<p class="tool-search-empty">' + escapeHtml(emptyText) + "</p>";
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function clearResults() {
      results.innerHTML = "";
      results.hidden = true;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = false;
      }
    }

    function renderResults(entries, tokens) {
      if (!entries.length) {
        showEmpty();
        return;
      }
      var html = entries
        .map(function (entry) {
          var snippetHtml = renderSnippet(entry, tokens);
          var href = entry.url + "#sphinxpress-search-hit";
          return (
            '<li class="tool-search-result">' +
            '<a href="' +
            escapeHtml(href) +
            '">' +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-title">' +
            escapeHtml(entry.title) +
            "</p>" +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-snippet">' +
            snippetHtml +
            "</p>" +
            "</a>" +
            "</li>"
          );
        })
        .join("");
      results.innerHTML = html;
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function renderSnippet(entry, tokens) {
      var source = entry.snippet || "";
      if (!source) {
        return "";
      }
      var lower = source.toLowerCase();
      var firstToken = tokens[0] || "";
      var idx = lower.indexOf(firstToken);
      if (idx < 0) {
        return escapeHtml(source);
      }
      var before = source.slice(0, idx);
      var match = source.slice(idx, idx + firstToken.length);
      var after = source.slice(idx + firstToken.length);
      return (
        escapeHtml(before) +
        "<mark>" +
        escapeHtml(match) +
        "</mark>" +
        escapeHtml(after)
      );
    }

    function runQuery(query) {
      if (!indexEntries) {
        return;
      }
      var tokens = query
        .toLowerCase()
        .split(/\s+/)
        .filter(function (token) {
          return token.length > 0;
        });
      if (!tokens.length) {
        clearResults();
        return;
      }
      var hits = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < indexEntries.length; i += 1) {
        var entry = indexEntries[i];
        if (!entry.sections || !entry.sections.length) {
          continue;
        }
        var matched = true;
        var score = 0;
        for (var t = 0; t < tokens.length; t += 1) {
          var token = tokens[t];
          var found = false;
          var tokenScore = 0;
          for (var s = 0; s < entry.sections.length; s += 1) {
            var section = entry.sections[s];
            var lowerText = section.lower || "";
            if (!lowerText) {
              continue;
            }
            var from = 0;
            while (from <= lowerText.length) {
              var foundAt = lowerText.indexOf(token, from);
              if (foundAt < 0) {
                break;
              }
              tokenScore += 1;
              from = foundAt + token.length;
            }
            if (tokenScore > 0) {
              found = true;
            }
          }
          if (!found) {
            matched = false;
            break;
          }
          score += tokenScore;
        }
        if (matched) {
          hits.push({ entry: entry, score: score });
        }
      }
      hits.sort(function (a, b) {
        return b.score - a.score;
      });
      var top = hits.slice(0, 20).map(function (hit) {
        return hit.entry;
      });
      renderResults(top, tokens);
    }

    function handleInput() {
      var query = input.value || "";
      if (!query.trim()) {
        clearResults();
        pendingQuery = null;
        return;
      }
      if (indexError) {
        hideForm();
        return;
      }
      if (indexEntries) {
        runQuery(query);
      } else {
        pendingQuery = query;
      }
    }

    input.addEventListener("input", handleInput);

    fetch(indexUrl, { credentials: "same-origin" })
      .then(function (response) {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error("HTTP " + response.status);
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then(function (payload) {
        if (
          !payload ||
          !Array.isArray(payload.entries) ||
          payload.entries.length === 0
        ) {
          hideForm();
          return;
        }
        indexEntries = payload.entries;
        if (pendingQuery) {
          runQuery(pendingQuery);
        }
      })
      .catch(function () {
        indexError = true;
        if (input.value && input.value.trim()) {
          hideForm();
        } else {
          hideForm();
        }
      });
  }

  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll("form.tool-search");
    for (var i = 0; i < forms.length; i += 1) {
      initForm(forms[i]);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();

</script>
{% endraw %}
